name: Serper

auth.notes: X-API-KEY header for POST requests; official playground-generated GET snippets also support apiKey query parameter.

rateLimits: Credit tier-specific: Starter 50 QPS, Standard 100 QPS, Scale 200 QPS, Ultimate default 300 QPS; higher concurrency can be requested.
pagination: page for most search-like endpoints; num on selected endpoints such as search/images/videos/news/shopping; nextPageToken for reviews/product reviews; maps page >1 requires ll GPS area.
notes: Official public docs are mostly homepage and playground generated examples; endpoint and parameter details were verified from the current official playground bundle.
No official SDK, CLI, MCP, or direct OpenAPI spec found. Community MCP/CLI implementations exist and must be treated as unofficial.
